description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a flat roof and a minimalist design. The front yard is landscaped with a mix of green grass, shrubs, and colorful flowering plants, while the rear section is bordered by taller trees and bushes for privacy. The exterior walls are clad in a light, neutral material, possibly stucco or painted concrete, with wooden paneling along the sides. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The main entryway is set back from the street, accessed via a paved walkway, and is marked by a simple, flush door without a porch or overhang. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on open outdoor space and functional layout.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, landscaped front yard, and large asymmetrical windows. The exterior features light walls with wood paneling and a simple, recessed entryway.
description_view_0: Front view shows the landscaped yard, main entryway, and a mix of shrubs and flowering plants leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the long, rectangular shape, flat roof, and wooden paneling along the exterior wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displays taller trees and bushes providing privacy, with fewer visible windows and a solid back wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals additional landscaping and the continuation of the wooden paneling, with the driveway or walkway visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple, recessed entryway with a flush door and no porch or overhang, accessed by a paved walkway
